since_last: 65% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.13% · Gold +0.36% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 65% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.84%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Powering AI lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.84%; weakest is Powering AI at -0.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +5.18%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +5.18%, SAP +5.08%, NET +2.83%, DDOG +2.70%, ORCL +2.69%. Laggards: PWR -3.33%, NVT -2.13%, SPCX -1.87%, SKHY -1.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.87% at $116.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
